title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF MAHINOG, PROVINCE OF CAMIGUIN TO BE KNOWN AS MAHINOG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL II AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
108 OG No. 52, 6528 (December 24, 2012)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10234, October 29, 2012 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY POBLACION, MUNICIPALITY OF MAHINOG, PROVINCE OF CAMIGUIN TO BE KNOWN AS MAHINOG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL II AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be It Enacted By The Senate And House Of Representatives Of The Philippines In Congress Assembled:

Section 1.

Establishment Of A National High School. â

There Is Hereby Established, Under The Supervision Of The Department Of Education, A National High School In Barangay Poblacion, Municipality Of Mahinog, Province Of Camiguin To Be Known As Mahinog National High School Ii.

Sec. 2.

Appropriations.

â The Secretary Of Education Shall Immediately Include In The DepartmentâS Program The Operationalization Of The Mahinog National High School Ii, The Funding Of Which Shall Be Included In The Annual General Appropriations Act.

Sec. 3.

Implementation. â

The Secretary Of Education Shall Issue Such Rules And Regulations As May Be Necessary To Carry Out The Purpose Of This Act.

Sec. 4.

Effectivity.

â This Act Shall Take Effect Fifteen (15) Days After Its Publication In The

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.) Juan Ponce Enrile

President Of The Senate

(Sgd.)

Feliciano Belmonte Jr.

Speaker Of The House

Of Representatives

This Act Which Originated In The House Of Representatives Was Finally Passed By The House Of Representatives And The Senate On June 6, 2011 And July 24, 2012, Respectively.

(Sgd.) Emma Lirio-Reyes

Secretary Of The Senate

(Sgd.) Marilyn B. Barua-Yap

Secretary General

House Of Representatives

Approved:

Oct 29 2012

(Sgd.) Benigno S. Aquino III

President Of The Philippines
